endpoints.name: Retrieve outbound pricing for all countries.
endpoints.description: Retrieves the pricing information for all countries.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TYPE}} with a real type.

endpoints.name: Retrieve outbound pricing for a specific dialing prefix.
endpoints.description: Retrieves the pricing information based on the dialing prefix.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TYPE}} with a real type.

endpoints.name: Retrieve outbound pricing for a specific country.
endpoints.description: Retrieves the pricing information based on the specified country.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TYPE}} with a real type.
